description: Verso: Letter fragment in Judaeo-Arabic reporting a conversation--likely a disagreement. The writer mentions a warrāq, the fact that he doesn't trust something/someone, and a legal document (ḥujja) written for him for 5 dinars. The writer uses the colloquial ايش twice. On recto there is literary text in Arabic, perhaps a collection of poetry (wa-ghayruhu... ghayruhu...). (AP)
